title: For the In-Between
scripture_text: For everything there is a season, and a time for every matter under heaven.
reflection: In-between is not a failure of pacing. It is a place. Some of the most important work of your life will happen here.
body:
You are between things. Between jobs. Between relationships. Between the old self and the new one. Between the last chapter and the next one.

It is uncomfortable. In-between is uncomfortable by definition. You cannot go back. You cannot yet go forward. You can only be here.

The Lord meets people in the in-between. In the wilderness. In the exile. In the long night between the promise and its fulfillment. He is not in a hurry. He is walking with you. He is more interested in who you are becoming than in where you are going.

Be here. Be patient. The next chapter is being written, in you, in silence.
prayer: Lord, I am in-between. Teach me what I am meant to learn here. Amen.
